title: A Detailed Look at VEVOR’s 6×300 ft Weed Barrier Fabric for Gardens, Paths, and Landscaping
excerpt: BUY NOW 6×300 ft Weed Barrier Tear-proof & Easy to Cut & Weed Protection Our landscape…
body:
BUY NOW

6×300 ft Weed Barrier

Tear-proof & Easy to Cut & Weed Protection

Our landscape weed barrier fabric, also a geotextile fabric, features premium material and a solid structure to withstand various weather conditions for long-lasting use, effectively inhibit weed or grass growth, and avoid direct sunlight. The weed block fabric is a great helper to thrive your plants and reduce soil erosion.

  • Durable PP Fabric
  • High Permeability
  • Weed Control & Soil Improve
  • Easy Installation

VEVOR is a leading brand that specializes in equipment and tools. Along with thousands of motivated employees, VEVOR is dedicated to providing our customers with tough equipment & tools at incredibly low prices. Today, VEVOR has occupied markets of more than 200 countries with 10 million plus global members.

Why Choose VEVOR?

  • Premium Tough Quality
  • Incredibly Low Prices
  • Fast & Secure Delivery
  • 30-Day Free Returns
  • 24/7 Attentive Service

BUY NOW

Large Weed Barrier

The weed matting for garden measures 6.5×330 ft, large enough to cover 2145 square feet. As a result, you will not worry about your plants being disturbed by pesky weeds. In addition, excellent tear-proof and easily cut performance will provide you with high convenience.

Soil-friendly Polypropylene

The garden weed barrier is composed of high-quality woven polypropylene fabric, high density in 2.4oz, which is weatherproof, lightweight, and corrosion-proof can last for a long time uses.

Excellent Permeability

Our weed blocker is designed to let air through; thus, it can conserve your soil’s humidity.

Improve Soil Value

The landscaping fabric can maintain the soil humidity and improve the soil temperature, accelerating the decomposition of soil organic matter, stopping weeds from growing, and boosting your plants to multiply.

Easy to DIY

A legible green line is convenient for you to cut and layout your plants. Just unroll it, cut, and fix it to the desired area. Please secure ground cover weed barrier with staples for a better weed control effect (need to buy separately).

BUY NOW

Widely Used

Our weed control fabric works great as an underlayer for the greenhouse, vegetable patch, ground cover, patio garden, driveway, gravel walkway, road stabilization, drainage installations, rip rap & retaining walls, etc.

Specifications

  • Material: Polypropylene fabric
  • Size(LxW): 300 x 6 ft
  • Weight: 2.4 oz
  • Density: 12
  • Package size: 72.8 x 8.3 x 8.3 in
  • Gross weight: 25.8 lbs / 11.7 kg
  • Package Folded Size: 7.1″ x 7.1″ x 37.4″
  • Note:This product width is packaged in HALF-FOLD and rolled.

Package Content

  • 1 x PP Woven Ground Cover

Solve Your Weed Issue Using VEVOR Top-Quality Weed-Control Fabric That Can Last

Are you tired of struggling with weeds in your vegetable garden, around your trees, or along the underside of patio furniture? VEVOR weed control fabric is your go-to solution. The VEVOR landscape fabric (weed barrier) will keep your weeds under control, but still be permeable to air and water, so your soil, roots, and plants will do great.

Heavy-Duty Woven Ground Cover Built for Durability

Comprising professional-grade, woven PP (polypropylene) material, the VEVOR ground cover provides heavy-duty coverage that has a life span of at least 5 years, under the right conditions. Tested in actual weather, it is tear-resistant, weather-resistant, and resistant to erosion and UV degradation even with high foot or gravel overs.

Designed to Suppress Weed Growth while Allowing Moisture & Nutrients

The VEVOR shade cloth stops sunlight so that most of the weed seeds fail to grow. It provides exceptional drainage and permeability. Therefore, water passes through the soil, feeding the soil microbes and enabling nutrient recycling, unlike plastic sheeting, which will cause waterlogging or root rot.

Perfect for Vegetable Garden Beds & Planting Holes

VEVOR’s fabric comes printed with spacing guides to easily cut planting holes for vegetables like tomatoes, onions, garlic, lettuce, or cover crops. After poking or slitting holes, you lay the material flat, plant through the holes, and top with mulch. This method reduces the need to pull weeds manually, sparing you the time and labor throughout the year.

Installation That Saves Time and Reduces Hassle

Fold the fabric once; use simple garden staples or pins. Then, simply lay it bare, or even ground it to kill the weeds first. Overlap seams by 6 inches to 8 inches to prevent weeds from entering. Next, add a weighting layer of rock or mulch on top of it—no more wrestling with plastic sheets—just clean ground cover that keeps working in place.

Acts as a Physical Mulch Anchor That Holds Everything in Place

The VEVOR weed control fabric helps control weeds and locks your mulch, gravel, and other stuff in place, especially in windy or sloped areas. It creates a shield that makes everything stable, even in the middle of heavy rain or shifting dirt.

Saves Effort Around Lawn Edges and Structures

The edges of the garden are among the most neglected portions, where creeping grass and the most problematic weeds grow. This scotches the weed problem because access is blocked along fences, patios, and around the house, so less re-trimming or spot-spraying is required.

Low Maintenance for the Rest of the Season

Install it once, then forget it. Growing through spring, fall, and all in-between, this ground cover does the hard work for you. No constant pulling or spraying—a clean and tidy yard for the rest of the growing year.

Easy to Cut and Shape for Custom Landscaping

The material will likely not fray off after being punctured because of its firm weave. With varied spacing, you can poke holes and cut to whichever size suits the garden bed, or for different spacing. Be it room to put rows, or shrubs, it is simple to decide and readjust with a bit of effort.

Reliable in Wet or Dry Weather

The VEVOR professional-grade landscape fabric is stable in any weather conditions. It is UV, weight, and wear-resistant, and does not break down. It cleans drainage correctly, prevents weeds from growing, and works great throughout the season.

Smart Buy That Helps You See the Difference

You will notice the difference immediately, whether it is a staff cut or a general curb appeal enhancement. The VEVOR fabric is a great product that outsmarts its light competitors. An intelligent buy from a reputable brand can last many years and be operated in a friendly way.

Easy to Roll Up and Store

Any leftover fabric? No waste here. The roll stores fine in your shed or garage without curling or rotting. Just spread it again next year and it’ll be ready to go. This fabric rolls up easily for storage and can be reused season after season to block out most weeds effectively.

BUY NOW
